title: Call Forecast Variance Playbook
description: Document call assumptions, forecast by queue, compare actuals weekly, adjust staffing schedule. Variance before overtime.

mindset.principle: Forecast is a hypothesis. Variance review is the scientific method.

mistakes.label: Annual forecast never reconciled
mistakes.cost: Overtime surprises; ASA breaks in one queue only

mistakes.label: Calls per ship or install not written
mistakes.cost: No one knows what to fix when actuals miss

agent_signal.use_when: Call forecast exists but actuals diverge. Overtime or ASA miss tied to one queue. Assumptions not documented.
decision_criteria: Weekly variance by queue, not company total only.
Patch staffing schedule when variance sustains 4+ weeks.
agent_signal.operator_context: Variance review connects queue map and volume actuals to schedules.
agent_signal.not_for: Generic ops — fetch only when use_when matches; do not replace spine chain packs.
trigger_phrases: Call forecast exists but actuals diverge. Overtime or ASA miss tied to one queue. Assumptions not documented.
Need playbook: Call Forecast Variance Playbook
